sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this fighting game

special_mechanics.name: Jump Types
special_mechanics.description: Development text references multiple jump variants including forward jump (MAE JYANPU), backward jump (USIRO JYANPU), and vertical jump (SUICYOKU JYANPU). Jump attacks documented with timing variants (TEIICHI and KOUICHI)

special_mechanics.name: Defense Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Standing guard (TACHI BOUGYO) and crouching guard (SYAGAMI BOUGYO) documented in development text

special_mechanics.name: Attack Variants
special_mechanics.description: Multiple attack types documented including descending attacks (DATENN KOUGEKI), leg sweep (ASIBARAI), and throw mechanics (NAGE)

special_mechanics.name: Ranged Attacks
special_mechanics.description: Characters Lord Gustoff and Shazzer/Shnouzer have documented ranged attack inputs in manuals (back + Y button) but these are only functional for AI counterparts, not playable characters

tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise physics documentation available. Source material is primarily a game archaeology wiki entry covering development artifacts, regional differences, and debugging features. Contains development text references to move types and mechanics but no quantified movement or physics parameters. This is a one-on-one fighting game with limited technical documentation publicly available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Battle Blaze (SNES) article
